resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def defangIPaddr(self, address: str) -> str:
        return address.replace('.', '[.]')
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The `replace` method in Python efficiently replaces all occurrences of a substring with another substring. In this case, it replaces every '.' with '[.]', achieving the defanging of the IP address in linear time and space complexity.
